text: Ḥā, Meem.
By the clear Book,
Indeed, We sent it down during a blessed night. Indeed, We were to warn [mankind].
tl: Innaaa anzalnaahu fee lailatim mubaarakah; innaa kunnaa munzireen

text: Therein [i.e., on that night] is made distinct every precise matter -
[Every] matter [proceeding] from Us. Indeed, We were to send [a messenger]
As mercy from your Lord. Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Knowing,
tl: Rahmatam mir rabbik; innahoo Huwas Samee'ul 'Aleem

text: Lord of the heavens and the earth and that between them, if you would be certain.
tl: Rabbis samaawaati wal-ardi Wa-maa bainahumaa; in kuntum mooqineen

text: There is no deity except Him; He gives life and causes death. [He is] your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers.
tl: Laaa ilaaha illaa Huwa yuhyee Wa-yumeetu Rabbukum Wa-Rabbu aabaaa'ikumul awwaleen

text: But they are in doubt, amusing themselves.
Then watch for the Day when the sky will bring a visible smoke
tl: Fartaqib Yawma ta'tis samaaa'u bi-dukhaanin mubeen

text: Covering the people; this is a painful torment.
[They will say], \"Our Lord, remove from us the torment; indeed, we are believers.\"
How will there be for them a reminder [at that time]? And there had come to them a clear Messenger.
tl: Annaa lahumuz zikraa Wa-qad jaaa'ahum Rasoolum mubeen

text: Then they turned away from him and said, \"[He was] taught [and is] a madman.\"
Indeed, We will remove the torment for a little. Indeed, you [disbelievers] will return [to disbelief].
The Day We will strike with the greatest assault, indeed, We will take retribution.
tl: Yawma nabtishul batsha-tal kubraa innaa muntaqimoon

text: And We had already tried before them the people of Pharaoh, and there came to them a noble messenger [i.e., Moses],
tl: Wa-laqad fatannaa qablahum qawma Fir'awna Wa-jaaa'ahum Rasoolun kareem

text: [Saying], \"Render to me the servants of Allāh. Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger,\"
tl: An addooo ilaiya 'ibaadal laahi innee lakum Rasoolun ameen

text: And [saying], \"Be not haughty with Allāh. Indeed, I have come to you with clear evidence.
tl: Wa-al laa ta'loo 'alal laahi innee aateekum bisultaanim mubeen

text: And indeed, I have sought refuge in my Lord and your Lord, lest you stone me.
But if you do not believe me, then leave me alone.\"
And [finally] he called to his Lord that these were a criminal people.
tl: Fada'aa rabbahooo anna haaa'ulaaa'i qawmum mujrimoon

text: [Allāh said], \"Then set out with My servants by night. Indeed, you are to be pursued.
And leave the sea in stillness. Indeed, they are an army to be drowned.\"
tl: Watrukil bahra rahwan innahum jundum mughraqoon

text: How much they left behind of gardens and springs
And crops and noble sites
And comfort wherein they were amused.
Thus. And We caused to inherit it another people.
And the heaven and earth wept not for them, nor were they reprieved.
tl: Famaa bakat 'alaihimus samaaa'u wal-ardu Wa-maa kaanoo munzareen

text: And We certainly saved the Children of Israel from the humiliating torment -
tl: Wa-laqad najjainaa Baneee Israaa'eela minal 'azaabil muheen

text: From Pharaoh. Indeed, he was a haughty one among the transgressors.
tl: Min Fir'awn; innahoo kaana 'aaliyam minal musrifeen

text: And We certainly chose them by knowledge over [all] the worlds.
And We gave them of signs that in which there was a clear trial.
tl: Wa-aatainaahum minal aayaati maa feehi balaaa'um mubeen

text: Indeed, these [disbelievers] are saying,
\"There is not but our first death, and we will not be resurrected.
tl: In hiya illaa mawtatunal oolaa Wa-maa nahnu bimun-shareen

text: Then bring [back] our forefathers, if you should be truthful.\"
Are they better or the people of Tubbaʿ and those before them? We destroyed them, [for] indeed, they were criminals.
tl: Ahum khayrun am qawmu Tubba'inw wallazeena min qablihim; ahlaknaahum innahum kaanoo mujrimeen

text: And We did not create the heavens and earth and that between them in play.
tl: Wa-maa khalaqnas samaawaati wal-arda Wa-maa baina-humaa laa'ibeen

text: We did not create them except in truth, but most of them do not know.
tl: Maa khalaqnaahumaaa illaa bilhaqqi Wa-laakinna aksarahum laa ya'lamoon

text: Indeed, the Day of Judgement is the appointed time for them all -
The Day when no relation will avail a relation at all, nor will they be helped -
tl: Yawma laa yughnee mawlan 'am mawlan shai'anw Wa-laa hum yunsaroon

text: Except those [believers] on whom Allāh has mercy. Indeed, He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
tl: Illaa mar rahimal laah' innahoo huwal 'azeezur raheem

text: Indeed, the tree of zaqqūm
Is food for the sinful.
Like murky oil, it boils within bellies
Like the boiling of scalding water.
[It will be commanded], \"Seize him and drag him into the midst of the Hellfire,
Then pour over his head from the torment of scalding water.\"
tl: Summa subboo fawqa ra'sihee min 'azaabil hameem

text: [It will be said], \"Taste! Indeed, you are the honored, the noble!
Indeed, this is what you used to dispute.\"
tl: Inna haazaa maa kuntum bihee tamtaroon

text: Indeed, the righteous will be in a secure place:
Within gardens and springs,
Wearing [garments of] fine silk and brocade, facing each other.
Thus. And We will marry them to fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes.
They will call therein for every [kind of] fruit - safe and secure.
They will not taste death therein except the first death, and He will have protected them from the punishment of Hellfire
tl: Laa yazooqoona feehal mawtaa illal mawtatal oolaa Wa-waqaahum 'azaabal jaheem

text: As bounty from your Lord. That is what is the great attainment.
tl: Fadlam mir rabbik; zaalika huwal fawzul 'azeem

text: And indeed, We have eased it [i.e., the Qur’ān] in your tongue that they might be reminded.
So watch, [O Muḥammad]; indeed, they are watching [for your end].
